hooks.name: assistant-skill-router
hooks.description: Routes user prompts to matching skills

hooks.name: assistant-learning-signals
hooks.description: Detects learning signals in user prompts

hooks.name: assistant-workflow-enforcer
hooks.description: Injects workflow phase state and enforcement rules on every prompt

hooks.name: assistant-session-start
hooks.description: Injects task journal and memory feedback on session start

hooks.name: assistant-workflow-guard
hooks.description: Warns when orchestrator edits files directly during active task

hooks.name: assistant-pre-compress
hooks.description: Saves task state before context compression

hooks.name: assistant-stop-review
hooks.description: Checks if self-review was done before agent finishes

hooks.name: assistant-harness-gate
hooks.description: Enforces harness lifecycle: plan approval, rubric scores, score thresholds

hooks.name: assistant-session-end
hooks.description: Reminder to capture insights before session closes
